title: Path of the Wandering Monk
imageAlt: HeroQuest: Path of the Wandering Monk Box

description.paragraph: "HeroQuest: Path of the Wandering Monk" is an expansion for the classic board game HeroQuest. The graceful Monk hero is a student of unarmed combat techniques formed in reverence to the 4 elements.

contents.introduction: The "HeroQuest: Path of the Wandering Monk" includes the following components:

components.name: Cards
list: Elemental Style - Burning Spirit/Touch of the Endless Inferno
Elemental Style - Eye of the Storm/Soaring Dragon
Elemental Style - Speak with Stone/Strength of Mountain
